text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the evening before the holiest night of the
year... Visions of food are flashing through my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fried chicken, turkey, meatloaf, and the most
delectable cake...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's dinner time! We're having oden
tonight! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Crash! That's the sound of Super Creek destroying my holiday dreams.)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Is something wrong?
choice_data_list: I had something else in mind...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry. It's just that it's so cold now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's almost freezing outside, so I thought oden
would warm us up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is particularly cold. Super Creek is simply being as considerate as always.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I guess everyone really does want to eat
cake around this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering a while back if it was really
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well... One time, I was helping out at my family's
daycare center. I took one of the kids to the
park...

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I don't care if Mom comes to get me or
not!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: I just want my cake! That's all!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I don't think that boy actually wanted cake.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
He simply wanted to have a joyful holiday dinner
with his family.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I picked oden tonight. I thought you
might find it more comforting.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Should I have chosen something else instead?
choice_data_list: I'm more than happy with oden.
I'm more than happy with oden.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you! Let's warm up under the kotatsu
and eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a night when everyone else is eating cake, for
some reason we're pecking at oden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I guess this is what it means to truly have a
connection with someone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What a great meal! Did you eat your fill, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Glad to hear it! Now for dessert...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll bring out the cake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Crash! That's the sound of Super Creek destroying my holiday woes.)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Talk about a plot twist.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Mmm, that was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Could I ask you one more question?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I said before that it didn't matter what you eat as
long as you spend the day with the people you
care about, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Does that apply to all relationships?
choice_data_list: I'm not sure if I follow...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, if we weren't trainer and Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Would you have wanted to spend this occasion
with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think for a while but am unable to find an
answer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer?
choice_data_list: What do you think, Super Creek?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Me? Well... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Who knows! I'm starting to feel like it doesn't
matter. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room is filled with a comfortable warmth. I
decide to leave the conversation at that.
